title: March 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 7''' is the 66th day of the year (67th in leap years). There are 299 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Michael Jan Friedman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Wanda Sykes]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Tobias Menzies]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Ben Templesmith]] is born.
*[[1983]] – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|The Empire Strikes Back:]]'' "[[Fire and Ice]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 38|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 38]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Stephen Byrne]] is born.
*[[2000]] – [[Charlie Gray]] dies.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 7]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 46]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The Nebula Assassin]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Legacy (2006) 9|''Legacy'' (2006) 9]] published.
*2012 – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 5|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 5]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.44]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – All 121 episodes of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'', including the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|feature film]] and the thirteen previously unreleased episodes of [[The Clone Wars: The Lost Missions|''The Lost Missions'']], are released on [[Wikipedia:Netflix|Netflix]].
*[[2017]] – The first title of the ''[[Join the Resistance]]'' series published.
*2017 – ''[[Revenge of the Sith Read-Along Storybook and CD]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 44|''Star Wars'' (2015) 44]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 7|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 7]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Hunters: Battle for the Arena]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Hunters: Battle for the Arena (audiobook)|''Hunters: Battle for the Arena'' audiobook]] published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Jedi: Battle Scars]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Jedi: Battle Scars (audiobook)|''Jedi: Battle Scars'' audiobook]] published.
*2023 – ''[[Return of the Jedi: The Battle of Endor]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunters Ultimate Sticker Collection]]'' published.
<noinclude>
